steps.title: Inventory their access
steps.why: You cannot revoke what you have not listed.
steps.instructions: Open the person in AssetMost  -  their logins, floating accounts, devices and seats ARE this checklist.
steps.done_when: Their access list is printed/open and every item below maps to it.

steps.title: Disable sign-ins
steps.why: Order matters: identity first, then sessions, then remote paths  -  before they leave the building.

subtasks.title: Disable the Domain/AD account
subtasks.done_when: Account shows disabled in ADUC; a test bind fails.

subtasks.title: Block Microsoft 365 sign-in and revoke active sessions
subtasks.done_when: Sign-in blocked AND sessions revoked in admin center  -  blocking alone leaves live tokens.

subtasks.title: Revoke VPN and remote access
subtasks.done_when: A connection attempt with their profile is refused.

steps.title: Rotate floating accounts they held
steps.why: A departed person with a living shared password is a breach with a start date.
steps.instructions: Every pooled/shared account they held gets a new password TODAY; reassign or return seats in the registry.
steps.done_when: No floating account they held still accepts its old password.
steps.record: New passwords stored in the registry; holder lists updated.

subtasks.title: Laptop/workstation, chargers, peripherals
subtasks.record: Devices return to the pool marked "returned  -  needs reimage".

steps.title: Mail and voicemail routing
steps.instructions: Mailbox forwarding/auto-reply per policy; clear their voicemail forwarding.

steps.title: Reclaim license seats
steps.why: Ghost seats are money; they also hide real availability from the next onboarding.
steps.done_when: License counts reflect the freed seats.

steps.title: Archive mailbox and files
steps.instructions: Per retention policy; confirm before removal from groups.

steps.title: Deactivate in the directory
steps.record: Person marked inactive in AssetMost  -  history stays.

steps.title: Final access audit
steps.why: The audit is the offboarding; everything before it was preparation.
steps.done_when: Zero active logins, zero floating accounts held, zero devices assigned. Anything left is a finding, not a shrug.
